name: review_post
description: Output a structured quality review of a blog post.

score.description: Quality score 1-10. 1-4 = reject (AI slop), 5-6 = borderline, 7-10 = publishable.

issues.description: Specific issues found: clichés, filler sentences, generic advice, missing concrete examples, AI-isms like 'delve/landscape/crucial/it's important to note', corporate tone, etc.

strengths.description: What the post does well — specific voice, concrete examples, genuine opinions, etc.
